name: Desktop Commander MCP
description: MCP server for full desktop control. Lets AI agents execute shell commands, manage files, edit code with diff patches, and run long processes with live output streaming.

skills.name: Shell Execution
skills.description: Execute any shell command and stream live stdout/stderr output back to the AI agent

skills.name: File Operations
skills.description: Read, write, move, and delete files and directories on the local filesystem via MCP

skills.name: Diff Patching
skills.description: Apply targeted code edits as diff patches without rewriting entire files

skills.name: Process Management
skills.description: Start long-running processes, monitor output, and terminate when complete

skills.name: File Search
skills.description: Search file contents with ripgrep and list directory trees for codebase navigation
